TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Men-ten Á∑¨ÁĒł == Liksi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ hakiya mibatad tu aydaay nu pitu a lasubu idaw ku lima a wang nu mihcaan idaw ku mutidengay nu ungayen maudip, Men-ten idaw ku nikaadihan tu malumanay a ba'tuan nu mautangay a tuudan, nu baluhay a ba'tuan nu zitayan a liwan nu namaka babalakiay hinaadih kita, pasu aydaay a Yi-luo-wa-ti sa'wac a niyadu'an makaadih kita tu lima a malebu nu mihcaan a lalangwan nu liwan namaka babalakiay. . pelean ku Men-tan " pabaway a Men-tan" atu " sasaay a Men-tan" u Ing-kuo nu taydaay mikuwan a nikapapelaan . saan tu siyen nu ayawan tu tusa a lasubu mihcaan, u matinengay a madubaay nu tademaw micumud i Yi-luo-wa-ti sa'wac nu pabawan, mikuwan tu Cung-kuo atu In-tu nu sasiwbayan nu dadanan. nikudan nu tusaay a seci mung-cu tayni i Si-tan sa'wac, itida i walsipsiw mihcaan Men-ten a tademaw mikuwan tu Peaw sa'wac patideng tu Pu-kan-cen. itida i waltulimmihcaan -caypiclimpic mihcaan, Mung-cu kuo-wav mikuwan tu Nan-men-ten. caysepsipsip mihcaan ‚Äďcaytuwalpic mihcaan, Men-cu kuo-wan u Pu-kan-cen malingatu mikuwan. caytupicwal mihcaan, yen-caw sihu mipatideng tu Men-cung-sin-sen, mikuwan tu wali amis niyadu'an. nikudan miliyas, mipulung tu Yuen-na sen-cun-su-sin. caytuwalpic mihcaan -caylimlucay mihcaan, San-cu kuo-wan ci A-wa u Men-ten teban nu niyadu' malingatu mikuwan. caylimlucay mihcaan‚ÄĒcaypiclimtu mihcaan, Tun-yi wan-caw mikuwan tu Men-ten. caypiclimtu mihcaan ‚Äďcaywalwallim mihcaan, Kun-pan wan-caw mikuwan tu Men-ten. . caywaltusip mihcaan -caywaltunem mihcaan, sayaway malepacaw ku Ing-kuo Men-ten, Ing-kuo ku sibalucuay a makata. caywallimtu mihcaan, sakakina tusa a nikalepacawan nu Ing-kuo Men-ten, Ing-kuo a hitay maala nuheni ku Men-ten nu duma a kakaitidaan. cawwalwallim mihcaan sakatulu a malepacaw ku Ing-kuo Men-ten, mamin debungan nu Ing-kuo ku Men-ten, pacumud han i Ta-ing-ti-kuo sasay nu In-tu a lalaan, malaIn-kuo a In-tu nu niyaduan. Yun-kuy sakakaay ci Cen-yi-ing matineng tina kawawan pacudad, sakamusa ku cin-cen hu tu itidaay a Ing-kuo ci cen-ci-yi pasayda i Ign-kuo sihu mipaculi miwawies nai' ku puc. caywalwalnem mihcaan, Cung-kuo atu Ing-kuo itida i Pea-cin masasulit tu kiyaku " Cung-Ing-Men cudadan", patucek tu Cung-kuo palutatengan ku Ing-kuo tu Men-ten idaw ku nipapikuwanan tu nikakenihan, nika hidan tu nu Men-ten ku Cung-kuo, tu maycacay a bataan patungus. saan tu Cung-men lilis nai' ku watan tu nikakenisan, awnutusaay a kanatal ku masasudangay. 1824ŚĻīÔľć1826ŚĻī, ." caywalsiwsep mihcaan ‚Äďcaysiwsippic mihcaan, Cen-pan, Wa-pan mala Ta-ing-ti-kuo a diputan nu kanatal. Ke'-cin-pan, Cin-pan u kakenisan a sincen kitidaan. caywalsiwsip mihcaan, ci Sye-hu-cen itida i Lun-tun atu Ing-kuo masasulit tu " Cung-Ing-Ten-Men sasiwbayan a cudadan". caywalsiwpic mihcaan,misumad tu nikiyakuan tu nikakenisan tu lala' atu sasiwbayan milidasu a cudadan. Men-tan mihedek tu Ing-kuo kabulaway a lala' u Ing-ku nu In-tu a niyadu'an, u In-tu tapang ku pataydaay tu tademaw mikuwan tu Men-tan. caysiwlupic mihcaan sepat a bulad cacay a demiad, " In-tu sihu cuda" micuduh, Men-ten miliyas tu Ing-kuo u In-tu, mala Ta-ing-ti-kuo Men-ten niyadu'an. tuseptucay tusa a bulad cacay a demiad, Men-ten hitay patahekal tu sakay lawlaw nu hitay, ci Wun-san-su-ci dakepen nu Men-ten a hitay, maputun namin ku sakatahekal a telayan. sakamusa ku kanatal a patilibiay nu Men-ten saan caay ka kapah ku gigicu sisa caay patehekali, nikuda kapahtu saan Men-ten hitay mihapu tu kanatal tu sakabalihenawan tu cacay nu mihcaan a singbung. Men-ten hitay, sakamusa midakep ci Wun-san-su-ci a tademawan u wayway ,mamipatubeli i tuseptusep mihcaan nu Men-ten yi-huy pisingkiwan miawban tu nipisingkiw a nipatuduan. sabaw tusa a bulad enem a demiad, hiyan ni Nay-pi-duo-ce-pu-de-zuy huing saan " palawlaway ku cumi" atu " mibelihay tu sakay libung a puce" nu mapalekan ku cumi. sepat a mihcaan mapulul, u Kuo-cya-kun-li-wi-yen- hue sakakaay ci Men-an miwada tu tusa a mihcaan. 2021ŚĻī2śúą1śó•, 2ŚĻī. cen-ce atu hitay a kawaw śĒŅś≤ĽŤąáŤĽćšļč Men-ten ayda u hitay ku mikuwanay a kanatal, satalakaway nu mililiday a cikuo u " Men-ten kanatal mikuwana". ngangan han u kanatal a tapang atu sihu nu tapan ku Men-ten cung-tun, lima a mihcaan mikuwan, u Men-tan nu tusaay a yi-huy ku misingkiway. tatengaay u tapang nu sihu ku Men-tan cung-li, tuseptucay mihcaan taluma'ac, mitusa tu kawaw u Men-ten hitay sakakaay atu kuo-cya-kun-li-wi-yen-huy sakakaay ci Men-an ku sikawaway. . sakaudip Á∂ďśŅü u liwmah ku kawaw nu Men-ten a kanatal, sakaudip nu heni tu mihmihcaan caycaywalsep menyen, mikawaway tu laliwmahan a tademaw makaala tu nemsep %, idaw ku tipus, mugi, tebus. Kilakilangan makaala tu limsep %, kilang u atekakay a kilangan atu sakaetiman a yiw-mu a kilangan. kitidaan nu Men-ten-len-pan-kun-he-kuo itida i wali timul a tipan amisan, wali atu Cung-kuo, Lew-kuo atu Tay-kuo mababiyaw, nupan a In-tu atu Mun-cya-la kanatal matatulin. nutipan timulan micapi tu Mun-cya-la sa'wac, timul sibiyaw tu An-ta-man bayu. ahebal makaala tu 676,578 pinhun-kunli, u wali timul i enalan u satabakiay a kanatalan. Men-ten liwliw u buyu' naming, nutipan idaw ku buyubuyu'an, amis idaw ku Si-ma-la-ya buyu', Hen-tun buyubuyu'an, wali atu walitimul u Cen-pan buyu' atu Dan-na-sa-lin buyubuyu'an. teban u enal. itida i amis Si-ma-la-ya buyu' teban a Kay-cya-puo-hu talakaw 5881 mi, u Men-ten u satalakaway nu wali timulan. . lalangaw Yeng-kun-ta-cin-se śĖáŚĆĖ šĽįŚÖČŚ§ßťáĎŚĮļ bungsang itida i Men-ten u sakasikadan, pabaway a fuocyaw itida i siyen nuayawan tu san se-ci idaw t uku pacuday i Men-ten, itida i sabaw tu cacay a seci mala hucunu binacadan a palutatengaan, katukuh ayda. . lalangaw nu Men-ten Á∑¨ÁĒłśĖáŚĆĖ kamu nu Men-ten u Han-cen a Cen-men-yi-cu-men-yi akamuan, u liwmah ku kawaw nu binacada, i sumamaday a lalanawan nu sasinzaan, wen-sya atu cen-ce, malalid nu In-tu lalangawan. u Pu-kan wancaw ku dayhiw, patideng i sabaw cacay a lingatu nu secian, u Pu-kan ku suo-tu. patideng tu sin-cen, idaw ku hulic, nituktukan a kilang atu nalimaan a nipikulit, nisulitan a Me-ten cudad maala ku Pa-li-wen atu Fan-wen, malabangcalay nu palutatengaan a sulit nu cudad. patidengan tu biyu a luma' " ciw-su-ci-kan-fuo-ta" ku dayhiw. . kakanen ť£≤ť£ü Mohinga ť≠öśĻĮÁĪ≥Á≤Č Men-ten a tada lami' Á∑¨ÁĒłÁöĄŚúčŤŹú tipus ku kasiidaan nu heni, u hemay ku kanen. sakalanam nuheni hina kan tu kabiay nu buting, sanasay a tuwmi, aam nu sanasay, samanta' han ku tuwami, samata' tu mihun atu panay, sanasay, waneng cancanan nu dankawan. mananam mukan tu uciya ku Men-tan a tademaw. tayda i uciyaan minanum tu sibulingay a uciyaan, mukan tu mantu, yuciyakuy atu yupin, manamuh minip tu kabi nu buting, aam nu taduk. . mikizay ku Men-ten a tademaw tu kan. u butin kabus a nimelecan masatawyuay, daydam, salamien ku wadayan, cileminay a papah ku sasahemayan. masinanut ku Men-ten a tademaw tu simal, aledahay, bangsisay, mantaay, cileminay, aheciday. nisalami'an han u nisatinpula, ididan, ciyan, pacikah han nanay ku tapang. ni satenpulaan atu ni ididan kapah singaan, samanta' hananay caay paakutien, mikapah tu udip. u sa'wac ku yadah tu bayu ku Men-ten, yadah ku buting udang, hina ala. yadah ku nisabutingan atu ulangan nu nisangaan a tuudan nu Men-ten,manamuh pacikah tu tebu' malacileminay a tebuan ku Men-ten, atu duma nu lami'an, sipalamel i basi, asu' ku azi. .

mar~…ĺumanaj a ba Ē~ °tuan nu mautaŇčaj a tuudan, nu bar~…ĺuńßaj a ba Ē~ °tuan nu zitajan a r~…ĺiwan nu namaka babar~…ĺakiaj ńßinaadińß kita, pasu ajdaaj a ji-r~…ĺuo-wa-ti sa Ē~ °wa ¶ a nijadu Ē~ °an makaadińß kita tu r~…ĺima a mar~…ĺ…ôbu nu mińß ¶aan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčwan nu r~…ĺiwan namaka babar~…ĺakiaj. . p…ôr~…ĺ…ôan ku m…ôn-tan " pabawaj a m…ôn-tan" atu " sasaaj a m…ôn-tan" u iŇč-kuo nu tajdaaj i ign-kuo sińßu mipa ¶ur~…ĺi miwawi…ôs nai Ē~ ° ku pu ¶. ¶ajwar~…ĺwar~…ĺn…ôm mińß ¶aan, ¶uŇč-kuo atu iŇč-kuo itida i p…ôa- ¶in masasur~…ĺit tu kijaku " ¶uŇč-iŇč-m…ôn ¶udadan", patu ¶…ôk tu ¶uŇč-kuo par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan ku iŇč-kuo tu m…ôn-t…ôn idaw ku nipapikuwanan tu nikak…ônińßan, nika ńßidan tu nu m…ôn-t…ôn ku ¶uŇč-kuo, tu maj ¶a ¶aj a bataan patuŇčus. saan tu ¶uŇč-m…ôn r~…ĺir~…ĺis nai Ē~ ° ku watan tu nikak…ônisan, awnutusaaj a kanatar~…ĺ ku masasudaŇčaj. ***********, ." ¶ajwar~…ĺsiws…ôp mińß ¶aan * ¶ajsiwsippi ¶ mińß ¶aan, ¶…ôn-pan, wa-pan mar~…ĺa ta-iŇč-ti-kuo a diputan nu kanatar~…ĺ. k…ô Ē~ °- ¶in-pan, ¶in-pan u kak…ônisan a sin ¶…ôn kitidaan. ¶ajwar~…ĺsiwsip mińß ¶aan, ¶i sj…ô-ńßu- ¶…ôn itida i r~…ĺun-tun atu iŇč-kuo masasur~…ĺit tu " ¶uŇč-iŇč-t…ôn-m…ôn sasiwbajan a ¶udadan". ¶ajwar~…ĺsiwpi ¶ mińß ¶aan,misumad tu nikijakuan tu nikak…ônisan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu sasiwbajan mir~…ĺidasu a ¶udadan. m…ôn-tan mińß…ôd…ôk tu iŇč-kuo kabur~…ĺawaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° u iŇč-ku nu in-tu a nijadu Ē~ °an, u in-tu tapaŇč ku patajdaaj tu tad…ômaw mikuwan tu m…ôn-tan. ¶ajsiwr~…ĺupi ¶ mińß ¶aan s…ôpat a bur~…ĺad ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, " in-tu sińßu ¶uda" mi ¶uduńß, m…ôn-t…ôn mir~…ĺijas tu iŇč-kuo u in-tu, mar~…ĺa ta-iŇč-ti-kuo m…ôn-t…ôn nijadu Ē~ °an. tus…ôptu ¶aj tusa a bur~…ĺad ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, m…ôn-t…ôn ńßitaj patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu sakaj r~…ĺawr~…ĺaw nu ńßitaj, ¶i wun-san-su- ¶i dak…ôp…ôn nu m…ôn-t…ôn a ńßitaj, maputun namin ku sakatańß…ôkar~…ĺ a t…ôr~…ĺajan. sakamusa ku kanatar~…ĺ a patir~…ĺibiaj nu m…ôn-t…ôn saan ¶aaj ka kapańß ku gigi ¶u sisa ¶aaj pat…ôńß…ôkar~…ĺi, nikuda kapańßtu saan m…ôn-t…ôn ńßitaj mińßapu tu kanatar~…ĺ tu sakabar~…ĺińß…ônawan tu ¶a ¶aj nu mińß ¶aan a siŇčbuŇč. m…ôn-t…ôn ńßitaj, sakamusa midak…ôp ¶i wun-san-su- ¶i a tad…ômawan u wajwaj ,mamipatub…ôr~…ĺi i tus…ôptus…ôp mińß ¶aan nu m…ôn-t…ôn ji-ńßuj pisiŇčkiwan miawban tu nipisiŇčkiw a nipatuduan. sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺad …ôn…ôm a d…ômiad, ńßijan ni naj-pi-duo- ¶…ô-pu-d…ô-zuj ńßuiŇč saan " par~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj ku ¶umi" atu " mib…ôr~…ĺińßaj tu sakaj r~…ĺibuŇč a pu ¶…ô" nu mapar~…ĺ…ôkan ku ¶umi. s…ôpat a mińß ¶aan mapur~…ĺur~…ĺ, u kuo- ¶ja-kun-r~…ĺi-wi-j…ôn- ńßu…ô sakakaaj ¶i m…ôn-an miwada tu tusa a mińß ¶aan. *********, **. ¶…ôn- ¶…ô atu ńßitaj a kawaw ***** m…ôn-t…ôn ajda u ńßitaj ku mikuwanaj a kanatar~…ĺ, satar~…ĺakawaj nu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj a ¶ikuo u " m…ôn-t…ôn kanatar~…ĺ mikuwana". ŇčaŇčan ńßan u kanatar~…ĺ a tapaŇč atu sińßu nu tapan ku m…ôn-t…ôn ¶uŇč-tun, r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan mikuwan, u m…ôn-tan nu tusaaj a ji-ńßuj ku misiŇčkiwaj. tat…ôŇčaaj u tapaŇč nu sińßu ku m…ôn-tan ¶uŇč-r~…ĺi, tus…ôptu ¶aj mińß ¶aan tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °a ¶, mitusa tu kawaw u m…ôn-t…ôn ńßitaj sakakaaj atu kuo- ¶ja-kun-r~…ĺi-wi-j…ôn-ńßuj sakakaaj ¶i m…ôn-an ku sikawawaj. . sakaudip ** u r~…ĺiwmańß ku kawaw nu m…ôn-t…ôn a kanatar~…ĺ, sakaudip nu ńß…ôni tu mińßmińß ¶aan ¶aj ¶ajwar~…ĺs…ôp m…ônj…ôn, mikawawaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺiwmańßan a tad…ômaw makaar~…ĺa tu n…ôms…ôp %, idaw ku tipus, mugi, t…ôbus. kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺims…ôp %, kir~…ĺaŇč u at…ôkakaj a kir~…ĺaŇčan atu saka…ôtiman a jiw-mu a kir~…ĺaŇčan. kitidaan nu m…ôn-t…ôn-r~…ĺ…ôn-pan-kun-ńß…ô-kuo itida i war~…ĺi timur~…ĺ a tipan amisan, war~…ĺi atu ¶uŇč-kuo, r~…ĺ…ôw-kuo atu taj-kuo mababijaw, nupan a in-tu atu mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa kanatar~…ĺ matatur~…ĺin. nutipan timur~…ĺan mi ¶api tu mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa sa Ē~ °wa ¶, timur~…ĺ sibijaw tu an-ta-man baju. ańß…ôbar~…ĺ makaar~…ĺa tu ***,*** pinńßun-kunr~…ĺi, u war~…ĺi timur~…ĺ i …ônar~…ĺan u satabakiaj a kanatar~…ĺan. m…ôn-t…ôn r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw u buju Ē~ ° namiŇč, nutipan idaw ku bujubuju Ē~ °an, amis idaw ku si-ma-r~…ĺa-ja buju Ē~ °, ńß…ôn-tun bujubuju Ē~ °an, war~…ĺi atu war~…ĺitimur~…ĺ u ¶…ôn-pan buju Ē~ ° atu dan-na-sa-r~…ĺin bujubuju Ē~ °an. t…ôban u …ônar~…ĺ. itida i amis si-ma-r~…ĺa-ja buju Ē~ ° t…ôban a kaj- ¶ja-puo-ńßu tar~…ĺakaw **** mi, u m…ôn-t…ôn u satar~…ĺakawaj nu war~…ĺi timur~…ĺan. . r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw j…ôŇč-kun-ta- ¶in-s…ô ** ***** buŇčsaŇč itida i m…ôn-t…ôn u sakasikadan, pabawaj a fuo ¶jaw itida i sij…ôn nuajawan tu san s…ô- ¶i idaw t uku pa ¶udaj i m…ôn-t…ôn, itida i sabaw tu ¶a ¶aj a s…ô ¶i mar~…ĺa ńßu ¶unu bina ¶adan a par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan, katukuńß ajda. . r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw nu m…ôn-t…ôn **** kamu nu m…ôn-t…ôn u ńßan- ¶…ôn a ¶…ôn-m…ôn-ji- ¶u-m…ôn-ji akamuan, u r~…ĺiwmańß ku kawaw nu bina ¶ada, i sumamadaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺanawan nu sasinzaan, w…ôn-sja atu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, mar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu in-tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. u pu-kan wan ¶aw ku dajńßiw, patid…ôŇč i sabaw ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺiŇčatu nu s…ô ¶ian, u pu-kan ku suo-tu. patid…ôŇč tu sin- ¶…ôn, idaw ku ńßur~…ĺi ¶, nituktukan a kir~…ĺaŇč atu nar~…ĺimaan a nipikur~…ĺit, nisur~…ĺitan a m…ô-t…ôn ¶udad maar~…ĺa ku pa-r~…ĺi-w…ôn atu fan-w…ôn, mar~…ĺabaŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj nu par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan a sur~…ĺit nu ¶udad. patid…ôŇčan tu biju a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° " ¶iw-su- ¶i-kan-fuo-ta" ku dajńßiw. . kakan…ôn ** mońßiŇča **** m…ôn-t…ôn a tada r~…ĺami Ē~ ° ***** tipus ku kasiidaan nu ńß…ôni, u ńß…ômaj ku kan…ôn. sakar~…ĺanam nuńß…ôni ńßina kan tu kabiaj nu butiŇč, sanasaj a tuwmi, aam nu sanasaj, samanta Ē~ ° ńßan ku tuwami, samata Ē~ ° tu mińßun atu panaj, sanasaj, wan…ôŇč ¶an ¶anan nu dankawan. mananam mukan tu u ¶ija ku m…ôn-tan a tad…ômaw. tajda i u ¶ijaan minanum tu sibur~…ĺiŇčaj a u ¶ijaan, mukan tu mantu, ju ¶ijakuj atu jupin, manamuńß minip tu kabi nu butiŇč, aam nu taduk. . mikizaj ku m…ôn-t…ôn a tad…ômaw tu kan. u butin kabus a nim…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶an masatawjuaj, dajdam, sar~…ĺami…ôn ku wadajan, ¶ir~…ĺ…ôminaj a papańß ku sasańß…ômajan. masinanut ku m…ôn-t…ôn a tad…ômaw tu simar~…ĺ, ar~…ĺ…ôdańßaj, baŇčsisaj, mantaaj, ¶ir~…ĺ…ôminaj, ańß…ô ¶idaj. nisar~…ĺami Ē~ °an ńßan u nisatinpur~…ĺa, ididan, ¶ijan, pa ¶ikańß ńßan nanaj ku tapaŇč. ni sat…ônpur~…ĺaan atu ni ididan kapańß siŇčaan, samanta Ē~ ° ńßananaj ¶aaj paakuti…ôn, mikapańß tu udip. u sa Ē~ °wa ¶ ku jadańß tu baju ku m…ôn-t…ôn, jadańß ku butiŇč udaŇč, ńßina ar~…ĺa. jadańß ku nisabutiŇčan atu ur~…ĺaŇčan nu nisaŇčaan a tuudan nu m…ôn-t…ôn,manamuńß pa ¶ikańß tu t…ôbu Ē~ ° mar~…ĺa ¶ir~…ĺ…ôminaj a t…ôbuan ku m…ôn-t…ôn, atu duma nu r~…ĺami Ē~ °an, sipar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ i basi, asu Ē~ ° ku azi. .
S.FORM: == Men-ten Á∑¨ÁĒł == Liksi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ hakiya mibatad tu aydaay nu pitu a lasubu idaw ku lima a wang nu mihcaan idaw ku mutidengay nu ungayen maudip, Men-ten idaw ku nikaadihan tu malumanay a ba'tuan nu mautangay a tuudan, nu baluhay a ba'tuan nu zitayan a liwan nu namaka babalakiay hinaadih kita, pasu aydaay a Yi-luo-wa-ti sa'wac a niyadu'an makaadih kita tu lima a malebu nu mihcaan a lalangwan nu liwan namaka babalakiay. . pelean ku Men-tan " pabaway a Men-tan" atu " sasaay a Men-tan" u Ing-kuo nu taydaay mikuwan a nikapapelaan . saan tu siyen nu ayawan tu tusa a lasubu mihcaan, u matinengay a madubaay nu tademaw micumud i Yi-luo-wa-ti sa'wac nu pabawan, mikuwan tu Cung-kuo atu In-tu nu sasiwbayan nu dadanan. nikudan nu tusaay a seci mung-cu tayni i Si-tan sa'wac, itida i walsipsiw mihcaan Men-ten a tademaw mikuwan tu Peaw sa'wac patideng tu Pu-kan-cen. itida i waltulimmihcaan -caypiclimpic mihcaan, Mung-cu kuo-wav mikuwan tu Nan-men-ten. caysepsipsip mihcaan ‚Äďcaytuwalpic mihcaan, Men-cu kuo-wan u Pu-kan-cen malingatu mikuwan. caytupicwal mihcaan, yen-caw sihu mipatideng tu Men-cung-sin-sen, mikuwan tu wali amis niyadu'an. nikudan miliyas, mipulung tu Yuen-na sen-cun-su-sin. caytuwalpic mihcaan -caylimlucay mihcaan, San-cu kuo-wan ci A-wa u Men-ten teban nu niyadu' malingatu mikuwan. caylimlucay mihcaan‚ÄĒcaypiclimtu mihcaan, Tun-yi wan-caw mikuwan tu Men-ten. caypiclimtu mihcaan ‚Äďcaywalwallim mihcaan, Kun-pan wan-caw mikuwan tu Men-ten. . caywaltusip mihcaan -caywaltunem mihcaan, sayaway malepacaw ku Ing-kuo Men-ten, Ing-kuo ku sibalucuay a makata. caywallimtu mihcaan, sakakina tusa a nikalepacawan nu Ing-kuo Men-ten, Ing-kuo a hitay maala nuheni ku Men-ten nu duma a kakaitidaan. cawwalwallim mihcaan sakatulu a malepacaw ku Ing-kuo Men-ten, mamin debungan nu Ing-kuo ku Men-ten, pacumud han i Ta-ing-ti-kuo sasay nu In-tu a lalaan, malaIn-kuo a In-tu nu niyaduan. Yun-kuy sakakaay ci Cen-yi-ing matineng tina kawawan pacudad, sakamusa ku cin-cen hu tu itidaay a Ing-kuo ci cen-ci-yi pasayda i Ign-kuo sihu mipaculi miwawies nai' ku puc. caywalwalnem mihcaan, Cung-kuo atu Ing-kuo itida i Pea-cin masasulit tu kiyaku " Cung-Ing-Men cudadan", patucek tu Cung-kuo palutatengan ku Ing-kuo tu Men-ten idaw ku nipapikuwanan tu nikakenihan, nika hidan tu nu Men-ten ku Cung-kuo, tu maycacay a bataan patungus. saan tu Cung-men lilis nai' ku watan tu nikakenisan, awnutusaay a kanatal ku masasudangay. 1824ŚĻīÔľć1826ŚĻī, ." caywalsiwsep mihcaan ‚Äďcaysiwsippic mihcaan, Cen-pan, Wa-pan mala Ta-ing-ti-kuo a diputan nu kanatal. Ke'-cin-pan, Cin-pan u kakenisan a sincen kitidaan. caywalsiwsip mihcaan, ci Sye-hu-cen itida i Lun-tun atu Ing-kuo masasulit tu " Cung-Ing-Ten-Men sasiwbayan a cudadan". caywalsiwpic mihcaan,misumad tu nikiyakuan tu nikakenisan tu lala' atu sasiwbayan milidasu a cudadan. Men-tan mihedek tu Ing-kuo kabulaway a lala' u Ing-ku nu In-tu a niyadu'an, u In-tu tapang ku pataydaay tu tademaw mikuwan tu Men-tan. caysiwlupic mihcaan sepat a bulad cacay a demiad, " In-tu sihu cuda" micuduh, Men-ten miliyas tu Ing-kuo u In-tu, mala Ta-ing-ti-kuo Men-ten niyadu'an. tuseptucay tusa a bulad cacay a demiad, Men-ten hitay patahekal tu sakay lawlaw nu hitay, ci Wun-san-su-ci dakepen nu Men-ten a hitay, maputun namin ku sakatahekal a telayan. sakamusa ku kanatal a patilibiay nu Men-ten saan caay ka kapah ku gigicu sisa caay patehekali, nikuda kapahtu saan Men-ten hitay mihapu tu kanatal tu sakabalihenawan tu cacay nu mihcaan a singbung. Men-ten hitay, sakamusa midakep ci Wun-san-su-ci a tademawan u wayway ,mamipatubeli i tuseptusep mihcaan nu Men-ten yi-huy pisingkiwan miawban tu nipisingkiw a nipatuduan. sabaw tusa a bulad enem a demiad, hiyan ni Nay-pi-duo-ce-pu-de-zuy huing saan " palawlaway ku cumi" atu " mibelihay tu sakay libung a puce" nu mapalekan ku cumi. sepat a mihcaan mapulul, u Kuo-cya-kun-li-wi-yen- hue sakakaay ci Men-an miwada tu tusa a mihcaan. 2021ŚĻī2śúą1śó•, 2ŚĻī. cen-ce atu hitay a kawaw śĒŅś≤ĽŤąáŤĽćšļč Men-ten ayda u hitay ku mikuwanay a kanatal, satalakaway nu mililiday a cikuo u " Men-ten kanatal mikuwana". ngangan han u kanatal a tapang atu sihu nu tapan ku Men-ten cung-tun, lima a mihcaan mikuwan, u Men-tan nu tusaay a yi-huy ku misingkiway. tatengaay u tapang nu sihu ku Men-tan cung-li, tuseptucay mihcaan taluma'ac, mitusa tu kawaw u Men-ten hitay sakakaay atu kuo-cya-kun-li-wi-yen-huy sakakaay ci Men-an ku sikawaway. . sakaudip Á∂ďśŅü u liwmah ku kawaw nu Men-ten a kanatal, sakaudip nu heni tu mihmihcaan caycaywalsep menyen, mikawaway tu laliwmahan a tademaw makaala tu nemsep %, idaw ku tipus, mugi, tebus. Kilakilangan makaala tu limsep %, kilang u atekakay a kilangan atu sakaetiman a yiw-mu a kilangan. kitidaan nu Men-ten-len-pan-kun-he-kuo itida i wali timul a tipan amisan, wali atu Cung-kuo, Lew-kuo atu Tay-kuo mababiyaw, nupan a In-tu atu Mun-cya-la kanatal matatulin. nutipan timulan micapi tu Mun-cya-la sa'wac, timul sibiyaw tu An-ta-man bayu. ahebal makaala tu 676,578 pinhun-kunli, u wali timul i enalan u satabakiay a kanatalan. Men-ten liwliw u buyu' naming, nutipan idaw ku buyubuyu'an, amis idaw ku Si-ma-la-ya buyu', Hen-tun buyubuyu'an, wali atu walitimul u Cen-pan buyu' atu Dan-na-sa-lin buyubuyu'an. teban u enal. itida i amis Si-ma-la-ya buyu' teban a Kay-cya-puo-hu talakaw 5881 mi, u Men-ten u satalakaway nu wali timulan. . lalangaw Yeng-kun-ta-cin-se śĖáŚĆĖ šĽįŚÖČŚ§ßťáĎŚĮļ bungsang itida i Men-ten u sakasikadan, pabaway a fuocyaw itida i siyen nuayawan tu san se-ci idaw t uku pacuday i Men-ten, itida i sabaw tu cacay a seci mala hucunu binacadan a palutatengaan, katukuh ayda. . lalangaw nu Men-ten Á∑¨ÁĒłśĖáŚĆĖ kamu nu Men-ten u Han-cen a Cen-men-yi-cu-men-yi akamuan, u liwmah ku kawaw nu binacada, i sumamaday a lalanawan nu sasinzaan, wen-sya atu cen-ce, malalid nu In-tu lalangawan. u Pu-kan wancaw ku dayhiw, patideng i sabaw cacay a lingatu nu secian, u Pu-kan ku suo-tu. patideng tu sin-cen, idaw ku hulic, nituktukan a kilang atu nalimaan a nipikulit, nisulitan a Me-ten cudad maala ku Pa-li-wen atu Fan-wen, malabangcalay nu palutatengaan a sulit nu cudad. patidengan tu biyu a luma' " ciw-su-ci-kan-fuo-ta" ku dayhiw. . kakanen ť£≤ť£ü Mohinga ť≠öśĻĮÁĪ≥Á≤Č Men-ten a tada lami' Á∑¨ÁĒłÁöĄŚúčŤŹú tipus ku kasiidaan nu heni, u hemay ku kanen. sakalanam nuheni hina kan tu kabiay nu buting, sanasay a tuwmi, aam nu sanasay, samanta' han ku tuwami, samata' tu mihun atu panay, sanasay, waneng cancanan nu dankawan. mananam mukan tu uciya ku Men-tan a tademaw. tayda i uciyaan minanum tu sibulingay a uciyaan, mukan tu mantu, yuciyakuy atu yupin, manamuh minip tu kabi nu buting, aam nu taduk. . mikizay ku Men-ten a tademaw tu kan. u butin kabus a nimelecan masatawyuay, daydam, salamien ku wadayan, cileminay a papah ku sasahemayan. masinanut ku Men-ten a tademaw tu simal, aledahay, bangsisay, mantaay, cileminay, aheciday. nisalami'an han u nisatinpula, ididan, ciyan, pacikah han nanay ku tapang. ni satenpulaan atu ni ididan kapah singaan, samanta' hananay caay paakutien, mikapah tu udip. u sa'wac ku yadah tu bayu ku Men-ten, yadah ku buting udang, hina ala. yadah ku nisabutingan atu ulangan nu nisangaan a tuudan nu Men-ten,manamuh pacikah tu tebu' malacileminay a tebuan ku Men-ten, atu duma nu lami'an, sipalamel i basi, asu' ku azi. .
S.PHON: == m…ôn-t…ôn ** == r~…ĺiksi ** ńßakija mibatad tu ajdaaj nu pitu a r~…ĺasubu idaw ku r~…ĺima a waŇč nu mińß ¶aan idaw ku mutid…ôŇčaj nu uŇčaj…ôn maudip, m…ôn-t…ôn idaw ku nikaadińßan tu mar~…ĺumanaj a ba Ē~ °tuan nu mautaŇčaj a tuudan, nu bar~…ĺuńßaj a ba Ē~ °tuan nu zitajan a r~…ĺiwan nu namaka babar~…ĺakiaj ńßinaadińß kita, pasu ajdaaj a ji-r~…ĺuo-wa-ti sa Ē~ °wa ¶ a nijadu Ē~ °an makaadińß kita tu r~…ĺima a mar~…ĺ…ôbu nu mińß ¶aan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčwan nu r~…ĺiwan namaka babar~…ĺakiaj. . p…ôr~…ĺ…ôan ku m…ôn-tan " pabawaj a m…ôn-tan" atu " sasaaj a m…ôn-tan" u iŇč-kuo nu tajdaaj mikuwan a nikapap…ôr~…ĺaan . saan tu sij…ôn nu ajawan tu tusa a r~…ĺasubu mińß ¶aan, u matin…ôŇčaj a madubaaj nu tad…ômaw mi ¶umud i ji-r~…ĺuo-wa-ti sa Ē~ °wa ¶ nu pabawan, mikuwan tu ¶uŇč-kuo atu in-tu nu sasiwbajan nu dadanan. nikudan nu tusaaj a s…ô ¶i muŇč- ¶u tajni i si-tan sa Ē~ °wa ¶, itida i war~…ĺsipsiw mińß ¶aan m…ôn-t…ôn a tad…ômaw mikuwan tu p…ôaw sa Ē~ °wa ¶ patid…ôŇč tu pu-kan- ¶…ôn. itida i war~…ĺtur~…ĺimmińß ¶aan - ¶ajpi ¶r~…ĺimpi ¶ mińß ¶aan, muŇč- ¶u kuo-wa* mikuwan tu nan-m…ôn-t…ôn. ¶ajs…ôpsipsip mińß ¶aan * ¶ajtuwar~…ĺpi ¶ mińß ¶aan, m…ôn- ¶u kuo-wan u pu-kan- ¶…ôn mar~…ĺiŇčatu mikuwan. ¶ajtupi ¶war~…ĺ mińß ¶aan, j…ôn- ¶aw sińßu mipatid…ôŇč tu m…ôn- ¶uŇč-sin-s…ôn, mikuwan tu war~…ĺi amis nijadu Ē~ °an. nikudan mir~…ĺijas, mipur~…ĺuŇč tu ju…ôn-na s…ôn- ¶un-su-sin. ¶ajtuwar~…ĺpi ¶ mińß ¶aan - ¶ajr~…ĺimr~…ĺu ¶aj mińß ¶aan, san- ¶u kuo-wan ¶i a-wa u m…ôn-t…ôn t…ôban nu nijadu Ē~ ° mar~…ĺiŇčatu mikuwan. ¶ajr~…ĺimr~…ĺu ¶aj mińß ¶aan* ¶ajpi ¶r~…ĺimtu mińß ¶aan, tun-ji wan- ¶aw mikuwan tu m…ôn-t…ôn. ¶ajpi ¶r~…ĺimtu mińß ¶aan * ¶ajwar~…ĺwar~…ĺr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan, kun-pan wan- ¶aw mikuwan tu m…ôn-t…ôn. . ¶ajwar~…ĺtusip mińß ¶aan - ¶ajwar~…ĺtun…ôm mińß ¶aan, sajawaj mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw ku iŇč-kuo m…ôn-t…ôn, iŇč-kuo ku sibar~…ĺu ¶uaj a makata. ¶ajwar~…ĺr~…ĺimtu mińß ¶aan, sakakina tusa a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu iŇč-kuo m…ôn-t…ôn, iŇč-kuo a ńßitaj maar~…ĺa nuńß…ôni ku m…ôn-t…ôn nu duma a kakaitidaan. ¶awwar~…ĺwar~…ĺr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan sakatur~…ĺu a mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw ku iŇč-kuo m…ôn-t…ôn, mamin d…ôbuŇčan nu iŇč-kuo ku m…ôn-t…ôn, pa ¶umud ńßan i ta-iŇč-ti-kuo sasaj nu in-tu a r~…ĺar~…ĺaan, mar~…ĺain-kuo a in-tu nu nijaduan. jun-kuj sakakaaj ¶i ¶…ôn-ji-iŇč matin…ôŇč tina kawawan pa ¶udad, sakamusa ku ¶in- ¶…ôn ńßu tu itidaaj a iŇč-kuo ¶i ¶…ôn- ¶i-ji pasajda i ign-kuo sińßu mipa ¶ur~…ĺi miwawi…ôs nai Ē~ ° ku pu ¶. ¶ajwar~…ĺwar~…ĺn…ôm mińß ¶aan, ¶uŇč-kuo atu iŇč-kuo itida i p…ôa- ¶in masasur~…ĺit tu kijaku " ¶uŇč-iŇč-m…ôn ¶udadan", patu ¶…ôk tu ¶uŇč-kuo par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan ku iŇč-kuo tu m…ôn-t…ôn idaw ku nipapikuwanan tu nikak…ônińßan, nika ńßidan tu nu m…ôn-t…ôn ku ¶uŇč-kuo, tu maj ¶a ¶aj a bataan patuŇčus. saan tu ¶uŇč-m…ôn r~…ĺir~…ĺis nai Ē~ ° ku watan tu nikak…ônisan, awnutusaaj a kanatar~…ĺ ku masasudaŇčaj. ***********, ." ¶ajwar~…ĺsiws…ôp mińß ¶aan * ¶ajsiwsippi ¶ mińß ¶aan, ¶…ôn-pan, wa-pan mar~…ĺa ta-iŇč-ti-kuo a diputan nu kanatar~…ĺ. k…ô Ē~ °- ¶in-pan, ¶in-pan u kak…ônisan a sin ¶…ôn kitidaan. ¶ajwar~…ĺsiwsip mińß ¶aan, ¶i sj…ô-ńßu- ¶…ôn itida i r~…ĺun-tun atu iŇč-kuo masasur~…ĺit tu " ¶uŇč-iŇč-t…ôn-m…ôn sasiwbajan a ¶udadan". ¶ajwar~…ĺsiwpi ¶ mińß ¶aan,misumad tu nikijakuan tu nikak…ônisan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu sasiwbajan mir~…ĺidasu a ¶udadan. m…ôn-tan mińß…ôd…ôk tu iŇč-kuo kabur~…ĺawaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° u iŇč-ku nu in-tu a nijadu Ē~ °an, u in-tu tapaŇč ku patajdaaj tu tad…ômaw mikuwan tu m…ôn-tan. ¶ajsiwr~…ĺupi ¶ mińß ¶aan s…ôpat a bur~…ĺad ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, " in-tu sińßu ¶uda" mi ¶uduńß, m…ôn-t…ôn mir~…ĺijas tu iŇč-kuo u in-tu, mar~…ĺa ta-iŇč-ti-kuo m…ôn-t…ôn nijadu Ē~ °an. tus…ôptu ¶aj tusa a bur~…ĺad ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, m…ôn-t…ôn ńßitaj patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu sakaj r~…ĺawr~…ĺaw nu ńßitaj, ¶i wun-san-su- ¶i dak…ôp…ôn nu m…ôn-t…ôn a ńßitaj, maputun namin ku sakatańß…ôkar~…ĺ a t…ôr~…ĺajan. sakamusa ku kanatar~…ĺ a patir~…ĺibiaj nu m…ôn-t…ôn saan ¶aaj ka kapańß ku gigi ¶u sisa ¶aaj pat…ôńß…ôkar~…ĺi, nikuda kapańßtu saan m…ôn-t…ôn ńßitaj mińßapu tu kanatar~…ĺ tu sakabar~…ĺińß…ônawan tu ¶a ¶aj nu mińß ¶aan a siŇčbuŇč. m…ôn-t…ôn ńßitaj, sakamusa midak…ôp ¶i wun-san-su- ¶i a tad…ômawan u wajwaj ,mamipatub…ôr~…ĺi i tus…ôptus…ôp mińß ¶aan nu m…ôn-t…ôn ji-ńßuj pisiŇčkiwan miawban tu nipisiŇčkiw a nipatuduan. sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺad …ôn…ôm a d…ômiad, ńßijan ni naj-pi-duo- ¶…ô-pu-d…ô-zuj ńßuiŇč saan " par~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj ku ¶umi" atu " mib…ôr~…ĺińßaj tu sakaj r~…ĺibuŇč a pu ¶…ô" nu mapar~…ĺ…ôkan ku ¶umi. s…ôpat a mińß ¶aan mapur~…ĺur~…ĺ, u kuo- ¶ja-kun-r~…ĺi-wi-j…ôn- ńßu…ô sakakaaj ¶i m…ôn-an miwada tu tusa a mińß ¶aan. *********, **. ¶…ôn- ¶…ô atu ńßitaj a kawaw ***** m…ôn-t…ôn ajda u ńßitaj ku mikuwanaj a kanatar~…ĺ, satar~…ĺakawaj nu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj a ¶ikuo u " m…ôn-t…ôn kanatar~…ĺ mikuwana". ŇčaŇčan ńßan u kanatar~…ĺ a tapaŇč atu sińßu nu tapan ku m…ôn-t…ôn ¶uŇč-tun, r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan mikuwan, u m…ôn-tan nu tusaaj a ji-ńßuj ku misiŇčkiwaj. tat…ôŇčaaj u tapaŇč nu sińßu ku m…ôn-tan ¶uŇč-r~…ĺi, tus…ôptu ¶aj mińß ¶aan tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °a ¶, mitusa tu kawaw u m…ôn-t…ôn ńßitaj sakakaaj atu kuo- ¶ja-kun-r~…ĺi-wi-j…ôn-ńßuj sakakaaj ¶i m…ôn-an ku sikawawaj. . sakaudip ** u r~…ĺiwmańß ku kawaw nu m…ôn-t…ôn a kanatar~…ĺ, sakaudip nu ńß…ôni tu mińßmińß ¶aan ¶aj ¶ajwar~…ĺs…ôp m…ônj…ôn, mikawawaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺiwmańßan a tad…ômaw makaar~…ĺa tu n…ôms…ôp %, idaw ku tipus, mugi, t…ôbus. kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺims…ôp %, kir~…ĺaŇč u at…ôkakaj a kir~…ĺaŇčan atu saka…ôtiman a jiw-mu a kir~…ĺaŇčan. kitidaan nu m…ôn-t…ôn-r~…ĺ…ôn-pan-kun-ńß…ô-kuo itida i war~…ĺi timur~…ĺ a tipan amisan, war~…ĺi atu ¶uŇč-kuo, r~…ĺ…ôw-kuo atu taj-kuo mababijaw, nupan a in-tu atu mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa kanatar~…ĺ matatur~…ĺin. nutipan timur~…ĺan mi ¶api tu mun- ¶ja-r~…ĺa sa Ē~ °wa ¶, timur~…ĺ sibijaw tu an-ta-man baju. ańß…ôbar~…ĺ makaar~…ĺa tu ***,*** pinńßun-kunr~…ĺi, u war~…ĺi timur~…ĺ i …ônar~…ĺan u satabakiaj a kanatar~…ĺan. m…ôn-t…ôn r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw u buju Ē~ ° namiŇč, nutipan idaw ku bujubuju Ē~ °an, amis idaw ku si-ma-r~…ĺa-ja buju Ē~ °, ńß…ôn-tun bujubuju Ē~ °an, war~…ĺi atu war~…ĺitimur~…ĺ u ¶…ôn-pan buju Ē~ ° atu dan-na-sa-r~…ĺin bujubuju Ē~ °an. t…ôban u …ônar~…ĺ. itida i amis si-ma-r~…ĺa-ja buju Ē~ ° t…ôban a kaj- ¶ja-puo-ńßu tar~…ĺakaw **** mi, u m…ôn-t…ôn u satar~…ĺakawaj nu war~…ĺi timur~…ĺan. . r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw j…ôŇč-kun-ta- ¶in-s…ô ** ***** buŇčsaŇč itida i m…ôn-t…ôn u sakasikadan, pabawaj a fuo ¶jaw itida i sij…ôn nuajawan tu san s…ô- ¶i idaw t uku pa ¶udaj i m…ôn-t…ôn, itida i sabaw tu ¶a ¶aj a s…ô ¶i mar~…ĺa ńßu ¶unu bina ¶adan a par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan, katukuńß ajda. . r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw nu m…ôn-t…ôn **** kamu nu m…ôn-t…ôn u ńßan- ¶…ôn a ¶…ôn-m…ôn-ji- ¶u-m…ôn-ji akamuan, u r~…ĺiwmańß ku kawaw nu bina ¶ada, i sumamadaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺanawan nu sasinzaan, w…ôn-sja atu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, mar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu in-tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. u pu-kan wan ¶aw ku dajńßiw, patid…ôŇč i sabaw ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺiŇčatu nu s…ô ¶ian, u pu-kan ku suo-tu. patid…ôŇč tu sin- ¶…ôn, idaw ku ńßur~…ĺi ¶, nituktukan a kir~…ĺaŇč atu nar~…ĺimaan a nipikur~…ĺit, nisur~…ĺitan a m…ô-t…ôn ¶udad maar~…ĺa ku pa-r~…ĺi-w…ôn atu fan-w…ôn, mar~…ĺabaŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj nu par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan a sur~…ĺit nu ¶udad. patid…ôŇčan tu biju a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° " ¶iw-su- ¶i-kan-fuo-ta" ku dajńßiw. . kakan…ôn ** mońßiŇča **** m…ôn-t…ôn a tada r~…ĺami Ē~ ° ***** tipus ku kasiidaan nu ńß…ôni, u ńß…ômaj ku kan…ôn. sakar~…ĺanam nuńß…ôni ńßina kan tu kabiaj nu butiŇč, sanasaj a tuwmi, aam nu sanasaj, samanta Ē~ ° ńßan ku tuwami, samata Ē~ ° tu mińßun atu panaj, sanasaj, wan…ôŇč ¶an ¶anan nu dankawan. mananam mukan tu u ¶ija ku m…ôn-tan a tad…ômaw. tajda i u ¶ijaan minanum tu sibur~…ĺiŇčaj a u ¶ijaan, mukan tu mantu, ju ¶ijakuj atu jupin, manamuńß minip tu kabi nu butiŇč, aam nu taduk. . mikizaj ku m…ôn-t…ôn a tad…ômaw tu kan. u butin kabus a nim…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶an masatawjuaj, dajdam, sar~…ĺami…ôn ku wadajan, ¶ir~…ĺ…ôminaj a papańß ku sasańß…ômajan. masinanut ku m…ôn-t…ôn a tad…ômaw tu simar~…ĺ, ar~…ĺ…ôdańßaj, baŇčsisaj, mantaaj, ¶ir~…ĺ…ôminaj, ańß…ô ¶idaj. nisar~…ĺami Ē~ °an ńßan u nisatinpur~…ĺa, ididan, ¶ijan, pa ¶ikańß ńßan nanaj ku tapaŇč. ni sat…ônpur~…ĺaan atu ni ididan kapańß siŇčaan, samanta Ē~ ° ńßananaj ¶aaj paakuti…ôn, mikapańß tu udip. u sa Ē~ °wa ¶ ku jadańß tu baju ku m…ôn-t…ôn, jadańß ku butiŇč udaŇč, ńßina ar~…ĺa. jadańß ku nisabutiŇčan atu ur~…ĺaŇčan nu nisaŇčaan a tuudan nu m…ôn-t…ôn,manamuńß pa ¶ikańß tu t…ôbu Ē~ ° mar~…ĺa ¶ir~…ĺ…ôminaj a t…ôbuan ku m…ôn-t…ôn, atu duma nu r~…ĺami Ē~ °an, sipar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ i basi, asu Ē~ ° ku azi. .
